info.title: Cortex Local API
info.description: Local-first REST API for Cortex, the Git-for-AI-Memory runtime. This surface covers versioning, review, query, conflicts, and merge workflows.

get.summary: Read lexical index status for a stored ref
Lookup memory nodes by id, canonical id, or label
Read a memory node by id

post.summary: Upsert a memory node and materialize a commit
Delete a memory node and materialize a commit

get.summary: Lookup memory edges by id or endpoint triple
Read a memory edge by id

post.summary: Upsert a memory edge and materialize a commit
Delete a memory edge and materialize a commit

get.summary: List claim events with optional filters

post.summary: Append a claim assertion and optionally materialize it
Retract a claim and optionally materialize it
Apply multiple object operations in a single commit-backed batch

get.summary: List commits for a branch or ref

post.summary: Checkout a graph version or ref
Review a graph against a baseline ref
Trace why a memory node exists
Read chronological receipts for a memory node
Run safe garbage collection and pruning
Query shortest path between two labels

ApiResponse.description: Generic JSON response envelope used by the local Cortex API.
